topStories.title: US blockade of Iran ports irresponsible and dangerous, China says
topStories.description: China, the biggest buyer of Iranian oil, says the US naval blockade undermines an "already fragile ceasefire".

topStories.title: Oil Cools As US, Iran Weigh More Talks With Blockade In Place; Brent Falls Over 3%
topStories.description: Iran is considering a short-term pause to its shipments through the Strait of Hormuz to avoid testing a US blockade and scuppering a fresh round of peace talks, according to a person familiar with...

dailyNews.title: In just a couple weeks, StrictlyVC San Francisco brings leaders from TDK Ventures, Replit, and more together
dailyNews.description:
The first StrictlyVC of the year will be coming to San Francisco before you know it.

There are still a few tickets available to join us and our stacked speaker lineup April 30, so register today!

dailyNews.description: Finance Ministe says National Green Tribunal stay led to stoppage of works, alleges YSR Congress Party neglected Rayalaseema irrigation during its five-year rule

dailyNews.title: BRS asks Congress Govt. to show respect to Ambedkar in deeds
JD Vance defends backing 'great guy' Orbán's campaign after landslide defeat
dailyNews.description: Hungary's leader was a "great guy" who did a "very good job", the US vice-president said, but he was sure he could work with Péter Magyar.

dailyNews.title: Why are the US, Iran arguing over duration of uranium enrichment ban?
dailyNews.description: The US reportedly wants Iran to stop enriching for 20 years. Iran has agreed to five years. Here's why that matters.

dailyNews.description: As Washington escalated pressure by imposing a blockade on Iranian ports, Tehran issued strong warnings, calling the move provocative.

dailyNews.title: Can Pakistan juggle US-Iran mediation with Saudi defence commitments?
dailyNews.description: Pakistani officials and a number of analysts say it can do both. But the balancing act won't be easy.

dailyNews.title: Trump deletes AI image depicting himself like Jesus after outrage
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump has deleted an AI-generated image of himself depicted as a Jesus-like figure.

dailyNews.title: How much will US Hormuz blockade hurt Iran, and does Tehran have an escape?
dailyNews.description: Iran earned $5bn in oil exports in past month while it shut the strait for most other ships. That revenue is at risk.

dailyNews.title: 'Not on our watch': Global law enforcement leaders unite in Poland against hate
dailyNews.description: Rising antisemitism since the Oct. 7 massacre drives a new global law enforcement effort focused on protecting vulnerable communities from hate crimes.

dailyNews.title: Jaguars' Travis Hunter pushes back on report of positional usage: 'Who told you that?'
dailyNews.description: Travis Hunter responded on X after a report said the Jacksonville Jaguars plan to use the 2024 Heisman Trophy winner as a full-time corner, part-time receiver.

dailyNews.title: Pelosi distances herself from ally Swalwell amid sexual misconduct allegations
dailyNews.description: Pelosi says she had no knowledge of sexual misconduct allegations prior to multiple reports revealing four women's accusations against Swalwell.

dailyNews.title: Swalwell's fall from grace sparks Democrat rush to return campaign contributions amid scrutiny
dailyNews.description: House and Senate Democrats face calls to return money from Eric Swalwell's Remedy PAC following sexual assault allegations against the congressman.

dailyNews.title: House to vote on aviation safety bill after deadly DC midair crash
dailyNews.description: The House is set to vote on the ALERT Act, an aviation safety bill prompted by the Jan. 29, 2025, midair collision near Reagan National Airport in D.C.

dailyNews.title: Kash Patel taunts Swalwell with FBI sit-down as resignation fallout grows
dailyNews.description: FBI Director Kash Patel invited crime tips about Rep. Eric Swalwell after he resigned amid sexual misconduct allegations from multiple women.

dailyNews.title: Mamdani's government-run grocery stores will fail 'like every socialist experiment': economist
dailyNews.description: NYC Mayor Mamdani, a Democratic socialist, plans five government-run grocery stores by 2030. An economist who grew up in Venezuela says they will fail.

topStories.title: JD Vance tells Pope Leo XIV to 'stick to matters of morality' and stay out of US public policy
topStories.description: President Trump posted criticisms of the American pope on Truth Social, calling him weak on crime, as Vance urges the Vatican to stay out of U.S. public policy.

topStories.title: Trump doubles down on feud with Pope Leo amid backlash over post depicting him as Jesus
topStories.description: President Trump spoke with CBS News' Norah O'Donnell on Monday night about his ongoing feud with Pope Leo XIV, saying the pontiff is "wrong on the issues." Meanwhile, Mr. Trump defended his now-deleted social media post of an AI image depicting him as Jesus Christ, telling reporters he thought it made him look like a doctor. CBS News' Chris Livesay and Olivia Rinaldi have more.

topStories.title: Trump reacts to backlash after posting AI image of himself as a Jesus-like figure
topStories.description: President Trump spoke to CBS News about his feud with Pope Leo XIV and the AI image he posted on social media that prompted bipartisan backlash. CBS News' Weijia Jiang reports, and Monsignor Anthony Figueiredo joins with more insight.

topStories.title: Meadows seeks reimbursement from DOJ for legal fees from Trump-related probes
topStories.description: Mark Meadows is asking the Justice Dept. to reimburse him for legal fees he incurred in multiple federal and state investigations of President Trump, sources said.

topStories.title: U.S. Is Negotiating an Iran Deal That Would Buy Time, Again
topStories.description: The United States proposed a 20-year “suspension” of all nuclear activity, even as President Trump demands assurances that Iran can never build a nuclear weapon.

topStories.title: Trump’s Latest Oil Blockade Brings Bigger Economic Risks
topStories.description: Oil markets shrugged it off, but the effort to hurt Iran could provoke retaliation that inflicts more damage on energy assets and the global economy.

dailyNews.title: Two Resignations in Congress, and the Pope’s Back-and-Forth With Trump
dailyNews.description: Plus, the rise of big bagel.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Attacks on Pope Leo Create Fresh Midterm Headaches for G.O.P.
dailyNews.description: Republicans are counting on the votes of Catholics to maintain control of Congress.

dailyNews.title: In Leo, Trump Faces a Different Kind of Papal Opponent
dailyNews.description: Unlike his predecessor, Pope Leo XIV enjoys growing support from a broad swath of conservative Catholics.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Explanation for an Image of Himself as Jesus: ‘I Thought It Was Me as a Doctor’
dailyNews.description: The image showed President Trump bathed in divine light and clad in religious robes. His interpretation was that the image depicted him as a doctor, not Jesus Christ.

dailyNews.title: Trump and MAGA Embraced Orban. Now, They’re Worried by His Loss in Hungary’s Election.
dailyNews.description: Viktor Orban, the Hungarian prime minister, and his right-wing playbook were embraced by parts of the American right. Now some are worried by his defeat.

dailyNews.title: Takeaways from the Times’s Look Inside D.H.S.
dailyNews.description: Eighty current and former employees talked to us about the Trump administration’s relentless push for mass deportations.

dailyNews.title: How Stephen Miller Is Adjusting Trump’s Immigration Agenda
dailyNews.description: After the chaos and death that ensued during the deportation raids in Minneapolis, Stephen Miller, the architect of President Trump’s mass deportation campaign, is changing course on immigration. Our White House correspondent Zolan Kanno-Youngs explains how the administration’s strategy is shifting.

dailyNews.title: Trump and New York Are in a Tug of War Over Medicaid Coverage
dailyNews.description: With tough new regulations looming in the president’s domestic policy bill, officials are coming up with plans to keep New Yorkers insured.

dailyNews.title: Kevin Warsh, Trump’s Pick for Fed Chair, Discloses Vast Wealth Ahead of Confirmation Hearing
dailyNews.description: Kevin M. Warsh vowed to divest a substantial amount of his more than $100 million in assets as he faces a complicated path to becoming the next chair of the Federal Reserve.

dailyNews.title: US Blockade of Strait of Hormuz Begins Amid New Push for Talks
dailyNews.description: The United States military’s partial blockade of the Strait of Hormuz imposed by President Donald Trump is now in effect, preventing Iran from exporting oil. Pakistan has proposed hosting a second round of talks in Islamabad before the two-week ceasefire expires. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

dailyNews.title: Trump Faces Bipartisan Backlash Over Feud With Pope Leo
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump is insisting he will not apologize to Pope Leo XIV after lashing out at the head of the Catholic Church for criticizing the Iran war. The president also offered a new explanation for the now-deleted and controversial AI image appearing to depict himself as Jesus that received swift bi-partisan backlash. NBC’s Garrett Haake reports for TODAY.

dailyNews.title: One of the most prominent investors in the Trump family's crypto company is now criticizing it
dailyNews.description: Justin Sun, among the largest investors in the Trump family’s primary crypto company, claims the company is misleading investors.
